name: oma-lwm2m-expert
description: The world's most comprehensive AI skill for the OMA Lightweight Machine-to-Machine (LwM2M) IoT device management protocol. Covers all specification versions (v1.0–v2.0), the full object/resource data model, all transport bindings (CoAP/UDP/TCP/SMS/Non-IP/MQTT/HTTP), DTLS/TLS/OSCORE security architecture, FOTA/SOTA flows, gateway and edge computing, 3GPP CIoT integration, GSMA SGP.32 eSIM, uCIFI smart city objects, oneM2M interworking, and the complete implementation ecosystem (Wakaama, Leshan, Anjay, Zephyr, Californium). Includes flow diagrams, troubleshooting guides, and Wireshark recipes.
capabilities: All LwM2M specification versions v1.0 through v2.0
Complete object/resource data model (core, IPSO, uCIFI, vendor)
All transport bindings: UDP, TCP, SMS, Non-IP, MQTT, HTTP
Security: PSK, RPK, X.509, EST, DTLS CID (RFC 9146 type 54), OSCORE
Protocol flows: Bootstrap, Registration, Observe/Notify, FOTA, SOTA
3GPP CIoT integration: NB-IoT, LTE-M, PSM, NIDD, SCEF/NEF
uCIFI Smart City objects (OMA Smart City WG)
Implementation guidance: Wakaama, Anjay, Leshan, Zephyr, IOWA
DTLS library comparison and CID interoperability (mbedTLS, wolfSSL, TinyDTLS)
Troubleshooting: DTLS handshake failures, bootstrap failures, FOTA errors

changelog.1.2.0: Added uCIFI smart city objects to objects.md; added OpenClaw install path to README; enriched v2.0 Northbound API coverage in SKILL.md; added cross-references between troubleshooting.md and protocol-details.md; added clawhub.json manifest
changelog.1.1.0: Added troubleshooting.md with comprehensive diagnosis flows, error codes, and Wireshark recipes; enriched architecture.md with FOTA rollback strategies, HAL/PAL patterns, and cloud connector integration
changelog.1.0.0: Initial release: full LwM2M v1.0-v2.0 coverage across 7 reference files
